summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory shard. The preflight artifact hydrates 40 open pull requests and reports no security-sensitive items. The job says not to invent a shared canonical; low-signal closeout, merge, fix, and raise-PR paths are unavailable or inappropriate, so each PR is kept independent for normal maintainer review.
